overall.description: A cinematic CGI sequence showing an orbital flight over a teal-colored alien planet. The camera descends from high-altitude cloud layers through the atmosphere, revealing the planetary curvature against space, before flying low over rugged icy mountain terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien planet upper atmosphere cloud layer

events.description: camera emerges from dense cloud cover revealing space and planetary curvature on the horizon

agents.ego_description: flying forward through dense atmospheric clouds at high altitude

entered.detail: thick teal-colored cloud formations covering the planetary surface
diffuse atmospheric particles in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a flight through dense teal-colored cloud formations in an alien planet's upper atmosphere. As the camera moves forward, the cloud layer gradually reveals the curvature of the planet and the blackness of space beyond.

events.description: descending from orbit toward the planetary surface as clouds dissipate

agents.ego_description: descending from orbital altitude toward the planetary surface while observing the atmosphere curve

entered.detail: thin glowing atmospheric layer outlining the planet's curvature against space
distant mountainous terrain becoming visible through thinning clouds

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the cloud layer into clear orbital space, revealing the planet's curvature and the thin glowing atmosphere. The view opens to show the rocky surface below as the descent continues.

events.description: camera banks left while navigating close to mountain ridge

agents.ego_description: flying low over rugged icy mountains, banking along cliff faces and terrain features

entered.detail: jagged icy mountain peaks and ridges covering the planetary surface
bright stellar object visible in the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a low-altitude flight over the planet's rugged icy terrain. The camera navigates close to mountain cliffs and ridges, revealing detailed rocky textures. A distant star shines in the black sky as the camera continues its exploration of the alien landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from the dense upper atmosphere of an alien planet down to its rugged, icy surface. It begins with a flight through thick teal-colored cloud formations that gradually part to reveal the planet's curvature against the blackness of space. As the camera breaks through the clouds into clear orbital space, the view expands to show the thin glowing atmosphere and the rocky terrain far below. The scene then shifts into a rapid descent, transitioning from the void of space to a low-altitude flight that navigates close to mountain cliffs and ridges. Finally, the camera glides over detailed rocky textures under a black sky where a single distant star shines.
